overall.description: A first-person exploration through a flooded, abandoned urban street in a stylized video game environment. The player moves through murky water between damaged concrete apartment buildings and rock formations under heavy fog and overcast skies, with PlayStation controller UI visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded rocky canyon between concrete ruins

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward through the narrow flooded canyon between large rock formations

entered.detail: large dark angular rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon
large dark angular rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon
murky water covering the ground with debris floating on surface
multi-story brutalist concrete building with red base visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow flooded canyon flanked by massive dark rock formations. The camera moves steadily forward through the murky water toward a distant concrete building visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded street with large abandoned apartment building

events.description: camera turns sharply to the right to face the large concrete apartment building
camera turns back to forward direction, passing the building which is now on the left

agents.ego_description: turning to inspect the large concrete building on the right before continuing forward past it

entered.detail: cluster of evergreen trees visible behind the rocky formations
tall thin tower structure visible in the far distance down the street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to examine a large abandoned concrete apartment building up close, revealing its weathered facade and red ground floor. After observing, it turns back to forward motion, passing the building as it transitions from the narrow canyon to a more open flooded street with a distant tower visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: long flooded urban boulevard with distant tower landmark

events.description: approaching closer to the distant tower structure as it becomes more defined in the fog

agents.ego_description: proceeding steadily down the long flooded street toward the distant tower structure

entered.detail: long multi-story concrete building with repetitive window patterns running along the right side
single deciduous tree growing on the flooded sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a long straight flooded boulevard flanked by abandoned concrete buildings. The camera moves steadily toward a distant communication tower that gradually becomes more prominent through the fog, passing a lone tree on the left while the long office building continues along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, rocky canyon that gradually opens into a wide, flooded urban boulevard. It begins by gliding through murky water between massive dark rock formations, moving steadily toward a distant concrete structure shrouded in fog. As the camera approaches, it turns to examine the weathered facade and red ground floor of a large abandoned apartment building before pivoting back to the path ahead. The scene then expands from the confines of the canyon into an open street, passing a lone tree and a long office building. Finally, the camera advances along the straight flooded boulevard as a distant communication tower becomes increasingly prominent through the haze.
